scripts.start: npm run build && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron .
scripts.build: tsc && gcc -framework ApplicationServices -framework CoreGraphics src/main/mouse_ctrl.c -o dist/main/mouse_ctrl && esbuild src/renderer/renderer.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/renderer/renderer.js --platform=browser --format=iife

extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: Aether-Command needs camera access to track your hand gestures.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Aether-Command needs microphone access for complete media control compatibility.
extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: Aether-Command needs to control other apps to perform actions like Play/Pause and Mute.
